Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JEFFREY S. WALKER, Esq. of Walker, Hamilton & Koenig, LLP (Tel: 415-986-3339) for plaintiff Sandra Ingrish;
Atty. BRIAN S. WHITTEMORE, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP (Tel: 415-362-6000) for Royal Bark & Meow and Lynn Miller.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SANDRA INGRISH's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admission; And For Sanctions Against Royal Bark And Meow, Lynn Miller, And Hinshaw Culbertson, LLP In The Amount Of $5,630.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Moving party to submit a proposed order in Word format to the Judge Pro Tem (cc'ing opposing counsel) by 5 p.m. today.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
